summary: Wrote android-accuracy-validator.py (mirrors ios-accuracy-validator.py). Scans kotlin/java fenced blocks for TypeName.member and Amity import refs against android.json v1.1 surface. Generated android-accuracy-drift.json.
notes: 250 issues across 64 files. Top refs look like nested enum/type misses (AmityStreamBroadcasterState.CONNECTED/DISCONNECTED — enum entries not captured; AmityRoomBroadcastData.CoHosts — nested type); AmityPostRepository.Builder — nested Builder class; AmityCommentReferenceType.POST — enum entry. AmityCommentRepository.get may be older API (renamed). Recommend a follow-up triage task (similar to 0020/0032) to classify and decide.
